name: East main street of Bree
description:
You are standing outside of an Inn, which can be entered to the north.  The
sign hanging over the door indicates it is The Prancing Pony.  Rumors abound
throughout your travels about the hospitality and good times to be had here.  
You have heard that it is the best in town.  An arrow on the wall points the
way to where horses can be stabled.  You can see a children's playground to the
south, and at times you can probably hear their laughter from here.
